message:
🐛 Fix Cost and Logs dashboard stats

Cost page:
- Use hourly rates matching ClusterCosts card (0.035/cpu, 0.0045/gb,
  2.50/gpu) for consistent pricing
- Include GPU costs from gpuNodes data
- Use memory estimate (32GB per node) to match ClusterCosts card
- Total cost now aligns with Cluster Costs card display

Logs page:
- Fix recent events count by using correct field name (lastSeen
  instead of lastTimestamp)
- Events were showing 0 because the field check always failed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
